surfaced.title: Financial stability vulnerabilities remain elevated as geoeconomic shock unfolds
surfaced.relevance: ECB explicit warning on systemic vulnerabilities during geoeconomic stress; critical for credit-equity dislocation monitoring in elevated-risk regime.

surfaced.title: Swiss National Bank cuts interest rates by a half point to 0.5%
surfaced.relevance: Central bank easing decision with direct credit and liquidity implications during elevated geoeconomic stress backdrop.

surfaced.title: Fed's Powell says rate cut 'on the table' as soon as September
surfaced.relevance: Forward guidance signalling potential Fed easing; tests thesis that credit markets may be underpricing recession risk if cuts arrive.

surfaced.title: Federal Reserve Board announces termination of enforcement actions with UBS Group AG, Credit Suisse AG, Credit Suisse Holdings (USA), Inc., and Credit Suisse AG, New York Branch
surfaced.relevance: Termination of Credit Suisse enforcement actions signals regulatory confidence in systemic stress resolution and banking stability post-crisis.

surfaced.title: Partners Group Is First Private Equity Fund To Gate Investors
surfaced.relevance: Private equity redemption gates and liquidity restrictions indicate emerging funding market stress not yet visible in credit spreads.
